inputs.titre: Trajan lance la construction de son forum à Rome

reason: The image depicts what appears to be the construction of Trajan's Forum in Rome. We see Roman-style buildings, columns, togas, tunics, and workers. The architecture aligns with what we'd expect for Roman construction. However, the wheeled vehicles used to transport materials appear to have rubber tires and modern axles, which are anachronistic. This causes a rejection of the image.
